auth.label: API Key
auth.description: API-SPORTS API key sent with the x-apisports-key header. Sign up and manage it from the official API-SPORTS dashboard: https://api-sports.io/.

actions.name: football_list_leagues
actions.description: Query football leagues by league, country, season or search keyword and return the current available data coverage capabilities.

country.description: The name of the country to which the league belongs.

code.description: The country code of the league.

season.description: Season year, represented by a four-digit number.

current.description: Whether to return only the current season league.

type.description: League type, such as league or cup.

anyOf.description: The name of the country to which the league belongs, or null if not available.
The country code of the league, or null if not available.
League logo address, null if not available.
The current season year, or null if none.

standings.description: Whether the league currently supports standings data.

players.description: Whether the league currently supports player statistics.

topScorers.description: Whether the league currently supports top scorer data.

predictions.description: Whether the league currently supports predictive data.

odds.description: Whether the league currently supports odds data.

events.description: Whether the league currently supports match event data.

lineups.description: Whether the league currently supports match lineup data.

statisticsFixtures.description: Whether the league currently supports match statistics.

statisticsPlayers.description: Whether the league currently supports player single-game statistics.

injuries.description: Whether the league currently supports injury statistics.

coverage.description: The data coverage capabilities currently available to the league.

items.description: One football league returned by API-SPORTS.

results.description: The number of results in the current response.
